utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Now check if each is fully specified per the format requirements: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides both costs (€210/month and €120/month) and details, so this is fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan explicitly sets included: false and provides no costs; hence not fully specified. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan sets included: false and provides no costs; hence not fully specified. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists services and an additional_cost field (states included in overall premium), which satisfies the cost requirement. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly and annual amounts, so it is fully specified. Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes only one identifiable item from the ground-truth lists: 'EliteCare Premium Plan' split into physical and mental components. Property and travel are not included. From the ground-truth ratings, 'EliteCare Premium Plan' appears under both primary health physical and mental health categories with ratings 6 and 3 respectively. Since the final plan explicitly uses 'EliteCare Premium Plan' for both physical and mental, we map each accordingly.
